notableEvents.label: Nasim Nuñez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Anthony Seigler to first baseman Andruw Monasterio. Luis García Jr. out at 2nd. Nasim Nuñez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile pops out to third baseman Caleb Durbin in foul territory.
